But the observer of that system must remain independent. A network that monitors itself with its own components cannot detect the failure of those components — it has no external reference point."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[var(--muted)] text-sm leading-relaxed mb-6","children":"This is why Law VI — the Independence Principle — is the final and structurally necessary law.
